title: RBI pulls out ₹2 lakh crore transient liquidity via 7-day VRRR auction
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) withdrew ₹2 lakh crore from the banking system.
*   This action was taken to absorb "transient liquidity," meaning temporary excess cash.
*   The withdrawal was executed through a 7-day Variable Rate Reverse Repo (VRRR) auction.
